MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ARNOLD W. EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF JOAN MILLARD,WHO IS NOT PRESENT. HERBERT NATHAN, PROPERTY MANAGER, IS ORDERED PRESENT AT THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY TRINA RODERICK FOR DEFENDANT GARY M. GRIMES, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT AS INDICATED ABOVE. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. CASE SETTLED AND PARTIES ENTER INTO A SIGNED AGREEMENT WHICH IS FILED. JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION MADE IN OPEN COURT IS SUBMITTED FOR COURT FILING (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT).
